name: @gitgecko/plug-mcp-exposers
description: The plug that fits the mcp-gateway socket (owner: @gitgecko/mcp-gateway). Bridges code-intel retrieve + rules evaluate + review command capabilities into McpTool contributions that the gateway registry consumes. A deployable server loads this plug's contributions and exposes them over HTTP. Non-exclusive: multiple exposer plugs coexist (code-intel, rules, review each register their own tools).
